reviews.comment:
4 surtidores solo atienden dos..
Una sola persona atendiendo
Para que carguen 6 autos más de media hora..
Siendo automóvil club argentino deberían tener mucho mejor servicio

(Translated by Google)
Four pumps only serve two...
One person serving...
It takes more than half an hour to fill up six cars...
As an Argentine Automobile Club, they should have much better service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURuMG9tYnRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre que pasamos hay cola, nunca llega el.camion a tiempo...al ser de la zona de calingasta es una falta de respeto. Al ser la única todo el mundo necesita parar ya que en el departamento no hay otro lugar para cargar combustible seguro.

(Translated by Google)
There's always a line when we pass by; the truck is never on time. Being from the Calingasta area, it's disrespectful. Since it's the only gas station, everyone needs to stop because there's nowhere else in the department to get fuel safely.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURiNHVpdU1BEAE

reviews.comment:
Instalaciones muy viejas. Deberían remodelar. El shop es básico y con pocas opciones

(Translated by Google)
The facilities are very old. They should be remodeled. The shop is basic and has few options.
